intro: Heled is a variant spelling of Heleb (see also Heldai), a son of Baanah the Netophathite and one of David's mighty men listed in 1 Chronicles 11:30. The name appears with slight orthographic variations across the parallel lists in Samuel and Chronicles, reflecting normal textual transmission differences for minor names. He was part of the elite corps of warriors known as the Thirty who served David with exceptional courage.
